query:
UPDATE gallery_images SET image_url = CASE 
  WHEN id IN (9, 10, 11, 12, 13) THEN CONCAT('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1476514525535-07fb3b4ae5f1?w=900&h=600&fit=crop&t=', id)
  WHEN id IN (14, 15, 16, 17, 18) THEN CONCAT('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1488646953014-85cb44e25828?w=900&h=600&fit=crop&t=', id)
  WHEN id IN (19, 20, 21, 22, 23) THEN CONCAT('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1469854523086-cc02fe5d8800?w=900&h=600&fit=crop&t=', id)
  WHEN id IN (24, 25, 26, 27, 28) THEN CONCAT('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1552664730-d307ca884978?w=900&h=600&fit=crop&t=', id)
  WHEN id IN (29, 30, 31, 32, 33) THEN CONCAT('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517457373614-b7152f800fd1?w=900&h=600&fit=crop&t=', id)
  WHEN id IN (34, 35, 36, 37) THEN CONCAT('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1476514525535-07fb3b4ae5f1?w=900&h=600&fit=crop&t=', id)
  ELSE image_url
END WHERE id BETWEEN 9 AND 37;
command:

  WHEN id IN (9, 10, 11, 12, 13) THEN CONCAT('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1476514525535-07fb3b4ae5f1?w=900&h=600&fit=crop&t=', id)

  WHEN id IN (24, 25, 26, 27, 28) THEN CONCAT('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1552664730-d307ca884978?w=900&h=600&fit=crop&t=', id)
  WHEN id IN (29, 30, 31, 32, 33) THEN CONCAT('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1517457373614-b7152f800fd1?w=900&h=600&fit=crop&t=', id)
  WHEN id IN (34, 35, 36, 37) THEN CONCAT('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1476514525535-07fb3b4ae5f1?w=900&h=600&fit=crop&t=', id)
